title: SARM Decision
description: Records the outcome of attestation for a single ScopeItem. Per §3.4. Schema URI: urn:ietf:params:sarm:schemas:core:1.0:Decision. A Decision is a transient notification, not a hosted resource — SARM defines no Decision retrieval endpoint.

schemas.description: MUST contain the Decision core schema URI.

id.description: Unique identifier for this Decision within the Attestation Engine. Used as the idempotency key per §5.4.

scopeItemId.description: ID of the ScopeItem this Decision applies to.

decision.description: The decision selected by the certifier. MUST exactly match one of the 'value' entries in the corresponding ScopeItem's decisionOptions. SARM does not define a fixed decision vocabulary.

certifierId.description: Identifier of the person who made the decision.

decidedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when the decision was made.

channel.description: Informational. How the decision was captured. SARM defines NO channel vocabulary; this is an opaque string. Implementations MUST NOT branch on its value.

delegatedFrom.description: If the certifier was acting on behalf of another person.
